titleStmt.title: SII 10.409: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 409. (A.R. No. 642 of 1920.) ON A STONE LYING IN FRONT OF A PRIVATE HOUSE AT CHUṆḌŪRU, TENALI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 11[8]8.

summary.p: States that Pottepi Kā[ma]-Chōḍarāja consecrated the image of Chōḍa-Ballīśvara in the name of his younger brother and built a temple over it, and that Manma Gaṇapaya-Nāyaka made a gift of land to that temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śvasti caraṇasarōruhavihata
vilōcana trilōcanapramukhākhila
pritivīśvara kāritakavērītīra kari
kālakularatnapradīpāhitakumā
rāṁkuśa yoṟayūri puravarādhīśvara
sūryyavaṁśō[pa ?]va kāśyapagōtra jaga
dobbagaṁḍḍa tēṁkaṇāditya kīrttinārā
yaṇa parāṁganāputra śivapādaśē
khara nāmādisamastapraśastisa
hitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara
poṁttepigā cōḍamahārājulu
tama taṁḍri mādityadēvacō
ḍamahārājulakuṁ talli kāma
ladēviki dharmmuvugā tama ta
ṁmunipēra cōḍaballīśvarama
dēvaraṁ bratiṣṭa sēyiṁcci śi
vālaya metticci śakavarṣaṁbu
lu 1188 nēṁṭi
svasti śrīmanmahārāya gajasāhiṇi manmaga ṇaṁpa
yanāyuṁkulu Īśānadēvaḷuku cuṁḍrūri
stalamulōpalanu peṭṭina vritti . 3 khaṁḍamulu sēnu
sarvvamānyamugānu svadattamugā niccenu
bollemavigāriki kha 1 na 10 koma
napediki kha 1 peddiṁgāriki kha 1 na 10
Note:—Lines 19 to 24 seem to constitute a separate inscription. The first incription stops suddenly in line 18.
Digital edition of SII 10.409 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
